notes: First patch is an agent_config/system_prompt change only.
Do not change model weights, environment code, task prompts, or graders for student-v1 unless a later QA bundle proves the task itself is defective.
Hosted prompt routing was validated with --student-system-prompt-file.
On fixed GDPval v7 medsec validation, student-v1 scored 0.5225 and student-v0 also scored 0.5225.
On fixed GDPval v7 acct validation, student-v1 improved from student-v0 0.369 to 0.4275.
On one_deal capstone regression, student-v1 scored 1.0.
Promotion requires QA Evaluator review and a full gate before final acceptance.
